title: Bloody Brat's Kanata Yoshino Launches New Manga
content: Kodansha 's Comic Days website launched Kanata Yoshino 's new manga series titled Yamai wa Ke kara -Shinri-shi Dōman no Sōdan-shitsu- (Illness Comes from the Supernatural -Psychologist Dōman's Counseling Room-), on March 22.
author: ANN

title: Solo Leveling Quietly Gets a Major Update on Anime’s Future
content: It’s been over a year since the second season of Solo Leveling reached its conclusion, and the anime is long overdue for a Season 3 announcement. However, the studio has stayed silent on the anime’s future all this time as fans await an update.
author: ComicBook

title: Major Shonen Jump Finally Confirms Streaming Homes Ahead of Spring 2026 Premiere
content: The Spring 2026 anime season is finally here, and it’s all set to premiere one of the most exciting Shonen Jump anime series of the year. Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump magazine offers a vast range of exciting series that often captivate fans with their incredible storytelling.
author: ComicBook

title: Nanana's Buried Treasure Novel's Kazuma Ōtorino, Artist Kagekaku Launch New Manga
content: The official X (formerly Twitter ) account of Hero's Inc. 's HERO'S Web (formerly Comiplex ) manga website announced on April 2 that writer Kazuma Ōtorino and artist Kagekaku will launch a new manga titled Warui Majo no Hiroi Ko ( A Girl Raised by the "Evil" Witch ) on the website on Thursday.
author: ANN

title: Netflix’s One Piece Season 3 Confirms First Story Details Ahead of 2027 Debut
content: One Piece is now in the works on Season 3 of the live-action series for Netflix, and the streaming service has confirmed the first story details about what to expect as it gets ready for its debut next year.
author: ComicBook

title: Existential Unplugged Creators Saji Komori, Kana Masaya Launch New Manga
content: The manga centers on two students named Takada and Yunomi, who are having another regular day at school, when suddenly they are whisked back in time to 2006. Komori and Masaya previously launched the Existential Unplugged ( Jitsuzon Unplugged ) manga (seen right) on Shueisha 's Shonen Jump+ manga service in March…
author: ANN

title: Alien Books Licenses Badducks, 'Akatsubaki,' Kill Logger Manga
content: Alien Books has licensed Toryumon Takeda 's Badducks , Mita Rokuju's "Akatsubaki," and Natsumi Inoue and Keita Sugaware's Kill Logger manga for release in late 2026. Title: Badducks Author: Toryumon Takeda Release Date: Fall 2026 Summary: The next series to be released as part of Alien's growing manga library,…
author: ANN

title: Anime With The Worst Release Schedules, Ranked
content: JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure: Steel Ball Run was one of the most anticipated anime arrivals in 2026, but unfortunately, fans haven’t been too thrilled with the release of the Joestars’ latest adventure on Netflix.
author: ComicBook

title: Witch Hat Atelier Exec Explains the Anime’s Many Changes From the Manga
content: Witch Hat Atelier has now made its debut as one of the standout releases of the Spring 2026 anime schedule this month, and the producer behind it all opened up about why there have been so many changes from the original manga seen in the premiere.
author: ComicBook

title: Makoto Fukami Launches New Manga Based on Board Game
content: Writer Makoto Fukami and artist Shūsaku Namikawa launched a new manga titled Chōgen Market Heroes: Menko Reverser Kakeru in Shogakukan 's web manga site Coro Coro Comic on March 28. The manga is an adaptation of the upcoming board game Chōgen Market Heroes by designer Creatures.
author: ANN
